description: Rewrote news widget to support all 9 GNews categories (general, world, nation, business, technology, entertainment, sports, science, health). Backend: added NewsCategory model, rewrote news service with concurrent category fetching via errgroup, raised cache TTL 30m→3h. Frontend: added NewsCategory type, rewrote NewsCard with scrollable pill tabs and per-category article grid, updated Dashboard.tsx prop name items→categories.
title: Implement multi-category news with pill tab UI
